• Creates a mining game with procedural terrain, inventory, and upgrades.
  • Supports mobile controls, custom textures, sound engine, and admin host election.
  • Provides UI modals for shop, settings, dashboard, warp, and notifications.
    GameEngine.init()
    ShopSystem.buy(item)

The page uses CSS variables for theming, a canvas for the world, and a set of HTML modals to handle gameplay actions. JavaScript defines the game loop, map generation, player physics, networking, and UI interactions while persisting player progress locally and via cloud sync. The system also includes a sound manager, custom texture loader, and host‑election logic for multiplayer sessions.
